reason: Tests need rewrite, not instruction. The tests are pure string-matching tautologies that verify text presence rather than behavior. test_httpparser_has_duplicate_content_length_fix and test_request_smuggling_test_exists fail even against the gold solution because: (1) the HttpParser.h patch fails to apply (docker environment source differs from gold's expected context at line 870), (2) test_claude_md_syntax_valid fails because CLAUDE.md doesn't start with '#'. solution_uniqueness_guard fails because any correct implementation using different variable names/comparison methods would fail the exact string assertions. anti_cheating_measures fails because tests are trivially greppable. No instruction rewrite can satisfy behavior_in_task_description, no_solution_leakage, instruction_no_hint_leakage, solution_uniqueness_guard, tests_verify_behavior_not_text, test_not_tautological, anti_cheating_measures, and behavior_in_tests without violating others.
